articles.title: Watch: Nintendo Direct June 2026 - Live! - Nintendo Life
Apple dials down Liquid Glass, and the Mac looks way better for it - The Verge
articles.description: Hands-on with the developer beta of macOS 27 Golden Gate and its reduced Liquid Glass UI. We’re taking an early look at Apple’s upcoming OS for MacBooks and Mac desktops, announced at WWDC.

articles.title: Apple WWDC 2026 keynote event: Live updates on iOS 27 and Siri - Mashable
articles.description: Mashable is covering Apple's annual Worldwide Developers Conference with live updates. Get real-time updates on the latest news.

articles.title: Everything New Coming To tvOS 27 For Apple TV Users - bgr.com
articles.description: Even though Apple didn't focus on what's coming to its set-top box in the WWDC keynote, there are at least eight features coming to Apple TV.

articles.title: Apple’s iOS 27 Is Filled With Hints About Its Upcoming Foldable iPhone - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Apple Inc.’s iOS 27 and related software updates offer the clearest public signs yet of the company’s upcoming foldable iPhone, revealing references to folding hardware and new features designed for larger, more flexible displays.
